name: netdust-statamic
description: Netdust Statamic plugin — Statamic 6 + Peak development on Laravel 13 + DDEV + Vite + Tailwind + Alpine. Commands for collection/block/service/feature scaffolding. Layers on netdust-core for memory, hooks, dev-stack, server management, deploy.
